news.title: Houthis deploy missiles and drones to attack ships in southern Red Sea, naval group says
news.summary: Attack on ships transiting the Bab el-Mandeb threaten to cut off millions of barrels per day of Saudi crude oil exports. Saudi Arabia is the world's largest exporter of crude oil.

news.title: Mortgage rates are rising again, but homebuyers are seeing some advantages
news.summary: Mortgage rates last week rose to the highest level since last August. But homebuyer demand climbed as well, as buyers see more supply.

news.title: Sen. Wyden introduces bill to curb Trump's tariff powers
news.summary: Sen. Ron Wyden said Trump has "abused every trade authority at his disposal" Wyden called his new tariffs on Canadian goods a "shakedown"

news.title: Samsung ups prices as it launches new foldable smartphones ahead of expected Apple debut
news.summary: Samsung launched the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z fold8 and Galaxy Z Flip8. Samsung also unveiled a new version of its foldable phone, the Galaxy S9. The Galaxy S8 is expected to be launched later this year.

news.title: AMD to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic as part of computing power deal
news.summary: Anthropic's agreement with AMD is the latest in a string of infrastructure deals the company has announced this year to increase its computing capacity.

news.title: We have $8 million in traditional IRAs. Should we tap them to buy a house — and take the tax hit?
news.summary: “We would rather pay taxes upfront than pay mortgage interest,” he says. “We’d rather pay tax upfront than paying mortgage interest.”

news.title: Global oil prices rise above $95 a barrel for the first time in 6 weeks as hopes dim for de-escalation of Iran war
news.summary: Oil prices climbed on Wednesday morning to a six-week high after the U.S. struck Iran for the 11th night in a row. President Trump warned that the United States will bomb Iran’s bridges and power plants if Tehran shoots at ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: This ‘incredibly disrespectful’ interview habit could be costing Gen Z jobs
news.summary: “This has more to do with the technology they grew up with rather than a sign of respect,” he says. “It’s more of a show of respect.”

news.title: Is Microsoft’s stock set for a breakout? This analyst says a major inflection is in the cards.
news.summary: Microsoft shares have slumped this year but a Bernstein analyst thinks the stock is due for a meaningful turnaround in the coming quarters. A Bernstein analyst says Microsoft shares are likely to turn around in the next few quarters.

news.title: How to ask strangers on the internet for financial advice
news.summary: You need some ground rules when posting on a public forum. Whether you’re emailing an expert or posting online, you need to follow these rules.
